parameters.description:
Set to true to get the total count of records in response.

**Note**: Default value set to false.

requestBody.description: Actual query to be executed

ObjectName.description: Name of object on which querying needs to be done.

Select.description: The fields which are to be displayed.

Distinct.description: Select true to get distinct records

Limit.description: Limit set for records to be fetched. **For example**: Limit = 100, This will fetch 100 records matching the criteria.

Skip.description: Number of records to be skipped.

FieldName.description:
Field name for sort. **For example**: FirstName.

**Note**: The sort field (in this case, FirstName) should be indexed or sortable.

GroupBy.description: List of field names which are to be grouped.
